popup.permissionDenied: Permission denied, unable to access cookies
popup.permissionDeniedDesc: Please grant "Access your data on all websites" permission to this extension in browser extension management page.
popup.domainUnavailableDesc: Please open a webpage to view and manage cookies
popup.confirmClearCurrent: Are you sure you want to clear cookies for {domain}?
popup.confirmClearAll: Are you sure you want to clear all cookies? (Except whitelist)
popup.noBlacklistCookies: No cookies to clear from blacklist sites
popup.thirdPartyDetected: {count} third-party cookies detected, please note privacy concerns
popup.trackingDetected: {count} tracking cookies detected, please be aware of privacy risks
popup.dangerZoneDesc: The following actions are irreversible, please use with caution
popup.modeSummaryWhitelist: Only cookies from whitelisted sites are protected
popup.modeSummaryBlacklist: Cookies from blacklisted sites will be cleaned

group.cleanupStrategyDesc: Configure Cookie cleanup rules and advanced options
group.automationDesc: Set up automatic cleanup triggers and intervals. Some features require browser extension permissions.
group.privacyRiskDesc: Enhance privacy protection and identify tracking risks
group.appearanceDesc: Customize interface theme and visual style
group.languageLogsDesc: Select interface language and log retention time

settings.permissionsNote: Note: Automatic cleanup and other features require browser extension permissions. Please grant "Access your data on all websites" permission in the browser extension management page.
settings.workModeDesc: Control the scope of cookie cleanup and choose the appropriate protection strategy for your needs
settings.whitelistMode: Whitelist Mode: Only exclude whitelisted sites from cleanup
settings.blacklistMode: Blacklist Mode: Only clean blacklisted sites
settings.cookieClearTypeDesc: Select the type of cookies to clear. Session cookies expire automatically when you close your browser
settings.scheduledCleanupDesc: Set the interval for automatic cleanup to ensure your privacy is continuously protected
settings.logRetentionDesc: Control how long operation logs are kept. Logs kept for too long may take up storage space
settings.themeModeDesc: Choose your preferred interface theme. Custom theme gives you full control over visual effects
settings.customThemeDesc: Customize your preferred color theme to create a unique visual experience
settings.autoCleanupDesc: Configure automatic cleanup behavior in different scenarios to reduce manual effort. Previous settings will be restored when re-enabled
settings.cleanupOnNavigate: Clean up cookies when navigating to a new page
settings.cleanupOnStartupDesc: Automatically clean up cookies for open tabs when browser starts
settings.cleanupExpiredCookies: Automatically clean up all expired cookies (triggers on browser startup and scheduled cleanup)
settings.cleanupExpiredCookiesDesc: Automatically detect and remove all expired cookies during browser startup and scheduled cleanup
settings.privacyProtectionDesc: Enhance your online privacy protection by identifying and alerting you to potential tracking behavior
settings.showCookieRiskDesc: Display a risk assessment indicator for each cookie in the list
settings.advancedCleanupDesc: In addition to cookies, you can also clean other browser storage that may store your data
settings.cleanupOnTabCloseDesc: Automatically clean up cookies when closing a tab
settings.cleanupOnBrowserCloseDesc: Automatically clean up cookies when closing the browser
settings.cleanupOnNavigateDesc: Automatically clean up cookies when navigating to a new page in the same tab
settings.cleanupOnTabDiscardDesc: Automatically clean up cookies for discarded/unloaded tabs

domainManager.whitelistHelp: Cookies from whitelisted domains will be protected from automatic cleanup
domainManager.blacklistHelp: Cookies from blacklisted domains will be prioritized for cleanup
domainManager.currentDomainInList: Current site is in the list
domainManager.currentDomainNotInList: Current site is not in the list
domainManager.clearBlacklistWarning: This will clear all cookies from blacklisted domains. Please proceed with caution
domainManager.emptyWhitelistHint: Add domains to whitelist to protect their cookies from cleanup
domainManager.emptyBlacklistHint: Add domains to blacklist to prioritize their cookie cleanup

clearLog.confirmClearLogs: Are you sure you want to clear all log records?
clearLog.logRetentionForever: Log retention is set to forever, no need to clean
clearLog.emptyLogsHint: Cookie management operations will be recorded here

cookieList.deleteSensitiveMessage: You are about to delete a sensitive cookie "{name}", which may log you out of this website. Are you sure you want to continue?
cookieList.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete cookie "{name}"?
cookieList.deleteSelectedSensitiveMessage: The selected cookies include {sensitiveCount} sensitive cookies, which may affect login status. Are you sure you want to delete the {selectedCount} selected cookies?
cookieList.deleteSelectedMessage: Are you sure you want to delete the {selectedCount} selected cookies?
cookieList.domainsAlreadyInWhitelist: Selected domains are already in whitelist
cookieList.selectDomainsFirst: Please select domains to add first
cookieList.domainsAlreadyInBlacklist: Selected domains are already in blacklist
cookieList.notSecure: Not Secure (may transmit over insecure connection)
cookieList.searchPlaceholder: Search cookie name, domain or value...
cookieList.filterDomainDisabled: Cannot get domain from current page, domain scope filter is unavailable
cookieList.errorInsufficientPermissions: Insufficient permissions, please grant "Access your data on all websites" permission to this extension in browser extension management page first
cookieList.errorInvalidParameters: Invalid parameters, please check your input
cookieList.errorInternalError: Internal error, please try again later

errorBoundary.errorMessage: Sorry, the extension encountered an error. Please try reloading.
